design_philosophy: A very light, minimalist, high-quality Apple-like design. The UI is the invisible frame; the tattoo art is the masterpiece. We use off-white backgrounds, soft diffuse shadows, generous whitespace, and subtle typography to create a calming, premium, and trustworthy booking experience.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid for marketing pages (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6), Control Room Grid for dashboards (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6)

surfaces_and_elevation.cards: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-black/[0.04] shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_elevation.inputs: bg-zinc-50 border border-transparent rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:bg-white focus:border-zinc-300 focus:ring-4 focus:ring-zinc-100 transition-all duration-200 outline-none

buttons.primary: bg-zinc-900 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgb(0,0,0,0.12)] transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-zinc-900 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium border border-zinc-200 hover:border-zinc-300 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-600 rounded-full px-4 py-2 hover:bg-zinc-100 hover:text-zinc-900 transition-all duration-200

animations.page_transition: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}
animations.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }} transition={{ duration: 0.7, ease: 'easeOut' }}

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 glass_header. Must have logo, main links, and CTA. Links show subtle underline or background pill on hover.
components.hero_section: Large typography, minimal text. High-quality image with VERY subtle overlay if text is on top. Prefer text on white background next to image.
components.studio_cards: Image takes top 60%, content bottom 40%. Soft shadow, rounded-2xl. Image scales slightly on hover.
components.booking_sidebar: Sticky on desktop. Clean date picker (Shadcn Calendar with rounded corners and soft active states), prominent 'Book Now' primary button.
components.dashboard_layout: Sidebar navigation with light grey background (bg-zinc-50). Main content area pure white. Tab navigation uses pill-shaped active states.
components.chat_interface: Two-panel. Left panel list of chats, right panel conversation. Bubbles are rounded-2xl, soft grey for incoming, dark zinc for outgoing.
components.ai_advisor: Minimalist chat-like interface. Upload area with dashed border and soft background, clear instructions.
components.icons: lucide-react, thin stroke width (1.5px) for an elegant, Apple-like feel.

images.description: Modern, clean tattoo studio interior. Use for landing page hero or about section.
Minimalist fine line tattoo on arm. Use for 'Featured Artists' or AI Style Advisor visual.
Tattoo artist working with black gloves. Use for 'How it Works' or Studio Registration sections.
Tattoo artist in modern studio. Use for Studio Detail Page gallery.
Woman with arm tattoo. Use for portfolio grids or search page placeholders.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the 'Premium Light Minimalist' aesthetic. Do NOT introduce dark mode or heavy colors.
Use Playfair Display for all main headings (h1, h2, h3). Use Inter for body text, UI elements, and buttons.
Never use pure black borders or harsh shadows. Use `border-black/[0.04]` and the defined soft shadows.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
Use Framer Motion for page loads and scroll reveals, keeping animations slow, soft, and elegant (ease-out).
For the Landing Page, ensure generous whitespace between sections (`py-24` or `py-32`).
For Studio Dashboard, avoid heavy card UI. Use light grey backgrounds and white panels with 1px soft borders.
Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize it to remove the 'Vercel look'. Increase border radii to `rounded-xl` or `rounded-2xl`, soften borders, and change primary colors to Zinc 900.
Buttons should have a subtle scale-down effect on click (active:scale-95) and a soft shadow on hover.
In the Booking Sidebar, ensure the form feels fluid. Use soft grey backgrounds for inputs that turn white on focus with a subtle ring.
